free_text: Measurement of cross-sections of production of
T.Nagy=(T.Nad' in Russian list of authors)
Fission events counting at beam on and beam off
(<10**-10) lets to use samples of high alpha-activity
as Am-241, Pu-240 and so on.
DATA 1 were derived from DATA 2 (primarily measured
by of counts at beam on and beam off) using fission
c-s for respective isotope as monitor. Monitor values
Subents 002,009 according to the comment of N.Otsuka,
